text: Aster Athletics ships from our Vancouver, British Columbia warehouse to every province in Canada and every state in the United States. Standard shipping is free on orders over 150 dollars, otherwise a flat 8 dollars, and arrives in 2 to 8 business days depending on how far you are from Vancouver. Express shipping is a flat 15 dollars and arrives in 1 to 2 business days. Orders placed before 1pm Pacific ship the same day. We ship only within Canada and the United States.

You can return unworn items with tags within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Returns are free: print the prepaid label from your order page and drop the parcel at any carrier location. Refunds land on your original payment method within 5 to 7 business days of us receiving the item.

To exchange an item for a different size or color, start an exchange from your order page and we ship the new item as soon as the carrier scans your return. There is no extra charge for an exchange. If the item you want is out of stock we issue a refund instead.

Every Aster Athletics garment carries a one year warranty against manufacturing defects such as seam failure, broken zippers, or fabric pilling under normal use. Warranty claims are repaired or replaced at no cost. The warranty does not cover ordinary wear, accidental damage, or improper care.

Every product page has a full measurement chart. Most Aster pieces are designed close to your usual size for an athletic fit: the Flow Legging is a compressive high-rise and the Vent Tech Tee is a regular fit. Fit varies by style, so check the measurement chart and the customer reviews for each item before choosing, and order one size up if you prefer a relaxed fit.

Machine wash Aster technical fabrics cold on a gentle cycle with like colors, and hang dry. Do not use fabric softener, bleach, or high heat, which break down the moisture-wicking finish. The Cloud Hoodie can be tumble dried low. Following the care label keeps the warranty valid.

We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Aster gift cards. Payment is charged when your order ships. We do not store full card numbers; payments run through a PCI compliant processor.

Aster Circle is our free loyalty program. You earn one point per dollar spent, and 100 points is worth 5 dollars off a future order. Members get early access to new drops and free express shipping during member events. Join at checkout or from your account page.

Digital Aster gift cards are available from 25 to 250 dollars and are emailed to the recipient right away. Gift cards never expire and can be combined with any promotion. They are not refundable for cash except where required by law.

For orders shipping to the United States, duties and taxes are calculated at checkout so there is nothing to pay on delivery. Canadian orders include applicable sales tax at checkout. We currently ship only within Canada and the United States.

If an item you bought goes on sale within 14 days of your order, contact support with your order number and we refund the difference as a one time price adjustment. Price adjustments apply to the same item and size and cannot be combined with a return and repurchase.

Aster leggings and tops are made from recycled nylon and polyester, and our mailers are recycled and recyclable. Our two suppliers are audited yearly for fair labor and water use. We take back worn Aster garments for recycling through the Aster Circle program.

Once your order ships we email a tracking link, and you can also see live tracking on your order page. If tracking has not updated for more than three business days, contact support and we will open a trace with the carrier or reship the order.

Aster support is available by chat and email seven days a week from 8am to 8pm ET. Typical email response time is under a day. For an in-person fitting, book a visit at any Aster store in Toronto, Vancouver, or New York.

Vous pouvez retourner un article non porte avec ses etiquettes dans les 30 jours suivant la livraison pour un remboursement complet. Les retours sont gratuits grace a une etiquette prepayee. Le remboursement est effectue sur votre mode de paiement dans les 5 a 7 jours ouvrables.

La livraison standard est gratuite pour les commandes de plus de 150 dollars, sinon 8 dollars, et arrive en 2 a 8 jours ouvrables selon la distance depuis notre entrepot de Vancouver. La livraison express coute 15 dollars et arrive en 1 a 2 jours ouvrables. Nous livrons uniquement au Canada et aux Etats-Unis.

Dressing for Vancouver and wet-weather cities: start with the Aster Storm Shell Jacket, a fully waterproof rain shell that handles the constant drizzle. On cold, wet days layer the Storm Shell over the Trailhead Puffer for warmth, with the Base Merino Long Sleeve underneath. Add the Peak Beanie for winter mornings. This layering system covers Vancouver from fall through spring.

The hot yoga kit: the Aster Vent Tech Tee is breathable and dries fast, the Studio Sports Bra gives high support for inversions and flows, and the Flow Legging is squat-proof and stays put. Skip cotton, which stays wet. Bring the Grip layering pieces for the studio and a change for after.

A one-bag travel capsule: the Base Merino Long Sleeve regulates temperature and resists odor over several wears, the Everywhere Jogger dresses up or down and resists wrinkles, the Storm Shell Jacket packs into its own pocket for rain, and the Commute Tote carries a laptop through the airport. Five pieces, a week of outfits.

Layering for the cold: the base is the Base Merino Long Sleeve, the mid layer is the Cloud Hoodie or the Trailhead Puffer for real cold, and the outer layer is the Storm Shell Jacket when it is wet. Finish with the Peak Beanie. Layers trap warmth better than one thick piece and let you adjust as you move.

Every Aster order ships from our fulfillment warehouse in Vancouver, British Columbia. Delivery time depends on the distance from Vancouver to your city, so the west coast is fastest and the east coast and Atlantic take longer. We use FedEx and Canada Post, with FedEx for express.

Free standard shipping applies automatically to orders over 150 dollars. Below that, standard shipping is a flat 8 dollars. Express shipping is a flat 15 dollars everywhere we deliver and arrives in 1 to 2 business days regardless of distance.

Delivery to British Columbia is fastest since we ship from Vancouver. Metro Vancouver arrives in 1 to 2 business days, Victoria in about 2 days, and Kelowna, Kamloops, and Nanaimo in 2 to 3 business days by standard shipping.
Delivery to Alberta takes about 3 to 4 business days by standard shipping. That covers Calgary, Edmonton, and Red Deer. Calgary orders typically arrive in 3 business days.
Delivery to Saskatchewan and Manitoba takes about 4 to 5 business days by standard shipping, covering Saskatoon, Regina, and Winnipeg.

Delivery to Ontario and Quebec takes about 5 to 7 business days by standard shipping from our Vancouver warehouse. That covers Toronto, Ottawa, Hamilton, Montreal, and Quebec City. Choose express for 1 to 2 business days.
Delivery to Atlantic Canada takes about 6 to 8 business days by standard shipping, covering Halifax, Moncton, Fredericton, Charlottetown, and St. John's.
Delivery to the US Pacific Northwest is fast because it is close to Vancouver. Seattle arrives in about 2 to 3 business days and Portland in 3 to 4 business days by standard shipping.

Delivery to California and the US West takes about 4 to 6 business days by standard shipping, covering San Francisco, Los Angeles, San Diego, and Las Vegas. Los Angeles typically arrives in 5 business days.
Delivery to the US Mountain and Central states takes about 5 to 7 business days by standard shipping, covering Denver, Phoenix, Dallas, Houston, Chicago, and Minneapolis.
Delivery to the US East Coast and South takes about 6 to 8 business days by standard shipping, covering New York, Boston, Washington DC, Atlanta, and Miami. Choose express for 1 to 2 business days.

We ship to Alaska and Hawaii. Because they are far from our Vancouver warehouse, standard delivery to Anchorage or Honolulu takes about 7 to 10 business days. Express is available and arrives in 2 to 3 business days.

We currently ship only within Canada and the United States. We do not ship to Mexico, and we do not offer international shipping outside Canada and the US at this time. Alaska, Hawaii, and Puerto Rico are included as US destinations.
For US orders, any applicable duties and import fees are prepaid at checkout, so there is nothing extra to pay on delivery. Canadian sales tax is calculated at checkout based on your province.
You can track your order from the tracking link in your shipping confirmation email or from the Orders page in your account. Tracking updates within a few hours of the label being created.

We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover, plus Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, and Shop Pay. You can also pay in four interest-free installments with Afterpay on orders over 50 dollars.

Our apparel runs true to size for most people. Leggings are compressive so size up if you prefer a looser feel. Every product page has a size chart with measurements in inches and centimeters, and reviews often mention fit. Sizes run XS to XL, with one-size for bags and accessories.

Our fabrics include four-way-stretch performance knits, merino wool base layers, brushed fleece, and recycled nylon shells. Many pieces use recycled or bluesign-approved materials, and we publish the fiber content on each product page.

Machine wash cold with like colors and hang dry or tumble dry low to protect the technical fabrics. Avoid fabric softener on performance pieces, since it coats the fibers and reduces moisture wicking. Merino can be washed cold on a wool cycle.
Digital gift cards are available from 25 to 250 dollars and are delivered by email with a code the recipient enters at checkout. Gift cards never expire and can be combined with promotions.
If an item you bought goes on sale within 14 days of your order, contact us for a one-time price adjustment to the sale price. We do not price match other retailers.

Aster Circle is our free membership. Members earn 1 point per dollar, get early access to new drops, member-only shipping offers during events, and a birthday reward. Points can be redeemed for discounts at checkout.

Our support team is available by chat and email seven days a week, 8am to 8pm Eastern. If the assistant cannot resolve something, such as a damaged item, a missing refund, or a return exception, it escalates to a human specialist who follows up by email within one business day.

We have three retail stores: Aster Gastown in Vancouver, Aster Yorkville in Toronto, and Aster SoHo in New York. All three offer in-store pickup and returns. Online orders ship from the Vancouver warehouse, not the stores.

Every Aster product is covered by our quality guarantee. If a piece fails from a manufacturing defect such as a seam or zipper, we will repair or replace it. The guarantee does not cover normal wear or damage from misuse.
You can change or cancel an order within 60 minutes of placing it from the Orders page, before it enters fulfillment. After that we cannot edit it, but you can return it once it arrives.
Buy online and pick up in store is available at all three stores, usually ready within 2 hours during store hours. You will get an email when your order is ready for pickup.
If a size is out of stock, tap Notify Me on the product page to get an email when it is restocked. Popular items are typically restocked within 2 to 3 weeks.
We offer a 15 percent discount for students and for healthcare workers and first responders, verified at checkout. Discounts cannot be combined with other promotions.

Restocks: our most popular pieces restock every two to four weeks. If something is sold out in your size, join the waitlist on the product page and we'll email you the moment it's back, or ask us and we can flag it for you.

Checking size availability: every product page shows live stock for each size, and low-stock sizes are flagged. If a size shows as out of stock it has sold out for now; tell us the item and size and we can check it or suggest the closest in-stock alternative.
Price adjustments: if an item you bought goes on sale within 14 days of your order, we'll refund the difference as a one-time price adjustment. Contact support with your order number.
